items.briefing:
Australian energy provider Origin has confirmed a data breach exposing customer information — if you're an Origin customer, watch for follow-up phishing emails or scam calls using your personal details. Separately, Australian research confirms that AI is making ransomware attacks more effective and harder to detect, meaning all staff need to stay alert to suspicious emails or unusual system behaviour.

Criminals are also using Bing ads to promote fake AI apps — including a fake Claude app — that install malware on your device. Only download software from official websites, not from search engine ads.

**Tip:** Never click "Download" from a search ad — go directly to the official website instead.

featured.title: Australian energy provider Origin says data breach exposes client data - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider Origin breached, exposing customer data to potential misuse.
